lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship; cargo capacity, shield MJ and laden jump range for the trade fits on this page.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternate outfitting planner used to cross-check optional-internal slot sizes, module mass and the engineered laden-range figures.

sources.label: Inara — Caspian Explorer
sources.what: Stock hull stats, optional-internal layout, utility-mount count and module sellers for this ship.

sources.label: Fandom — Caspian Explorer
sources.what: Manufacturer, Class-8 FSD integration, pad class and the no-weapon-hardpoint hull layout.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Caspian Explorer ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Caspian Explorer covering its capacity, module space and role versatility.
